translation_unit_protected_source_text: Triflimide (HNTf₂), also known as bis(trifluoromethanesulfonyl) imide, is a commercially accessible and highly versatile super Brønsted acid [15]. Its exceptional acidity and excellent compatibility with organic solvents have made it a valuable catalyst, promoter, and addi- tive in various organic reactions [16–20]. Unlike TfOH (a corrosive, fuming liquid), triflimide is much more user-friendly. A pioneering example of using triflimide to catalyze a Friedel-Crafts alkylation reaction was first demonstrated in 1996 by Yamamoto and co-workers [21]. Subsequently, a series of Friedel- Crafts and related reactions catalyzed by triflimide have been reported [22–25]. However, no syn- thetic reaction of spirocyclic compounds catalyzed by triflimide has been investigated.
translation_unit_protected_translated_te: 三氟甲磺酰亚胺（HNTf₂），又称双(三氟甲磺酰)亚胺，是一种市售且用途广泛的超强布朗斯特酸[15]。其极高的酸性和与有机溶剂的良好相容性，使其成为多种有机反应中有价值的催化剂、促进剂和添加剂[16–20]。与TfOH（一种腐蚀性发烟液体）不同，三氟甲磺酰亚胺的使用更为便捷。1996年，Yamamoto及其同事首次报道了使用三氟甲磺酰亚胺催化Friedel-Crafts烷基化反应的开创性实例[21]。随后，一系列由三氟甲磺酰亚胺催化的Friedel-Crafts及相关反应相继被报道[22–25]。然而，目前尚未有关于三氟甲磺酰亚胺催化螺环化合物合成反应的研究。
translation_unit_translated_text: 三氟甲磺酰亚胺（HNTf₂），又称双(三氟甲磺酰)亚胺，是一种市售且用途广泛的超强布朗斯特酸[15]。其极高的酸性和与有机溶剂的良好相容性，使其成为多种有机反应中有价值的催化剂、促进剂和添加剂[16–20]。与TfOH（一种腐蚀性发烟液体）不同，三氟甲磺酰亚胺的使用更为便捷。1996年，Yamamoto及其同事首次报道了使用三氟甲磺酰亚胺催化Friedel-Crafts烷基化反应的开创性实例[21]。随后，一系列由三氟甲磺酰亚胺催化的Friedel-Crafts及相关反应相继被报道[22–25]。然而，目前尚未有关于三氟甲磺酰亚胺催化螺环化合物合成反应的研究。

Its exceptional acidity and excellent compatibility with organic solvents have made it a valuable catalyst, promoter, and addi- tive in various organic reactions [16–20]. Unlike TfOH (a corrosive, fuming liquid), triflimide is much more user-friendly. A pioneering example of using triflimide to catalyze a Friedel-Crafts alkylation
group_protected_source_text: Triflimide (HNTf₂), also known as bis(trifluoromethanesulfonyl) imide, is a commercially accessible and highly versatile super Brønsted acid [15]. Its exceptional acidity and excellent compatibility with organic solvents have made it a valuable catalyst, promoter, and addi- tive in various organic reactions [16–20]. Unlike TfOH (a corrosive, fuming liquid), triflimide is much more user-friendly. A pioneering example of using triflimide to catalyze a Friedel-Crafts alkylation reaction was first demonstrated in 1996 by Yamamoto and co-workers [21]. Subsequently, a series of Friedel- Crafts and related reactions catalyzed by triflimide have been reported [22–25]. However, no syn- thetic reaction of spirocyclic compounds catalyzed by triflimide has been investigated.

translation_unit_protected_source_text: Recently, our group developed a new method for the synthesis of spiro[acridine-9(10H),9′-[9H]fluorene] (SPF1) through one-step cyclization of diarylamine (1a) with fluorenone (2a) using [[FORMULA_1]] as a catalyst (Table 1).

source_text: As can be seen from Table 1, the yield reaches the highest when the feed ratio of 1a to 2a is 1.1:1 and the catalyst amount (relative to 2a) is 1 0 \mathrm { m o l } \% . For example, by employing 1.1 equiv. of 1a, 1.0 equiv. of 2a and 0.1 equiv. of HNTf₂ in 1,4 - dioxane, the reaction was carried out at 8 0 ~ ^ { \circ } \mathrm { C } for 6 h. SPF1 was obtained in 8 9 ~ \% yield (Table 1, entrys 1–3).

For example, by employing 1.1 equiv. of 1a, 1.0 equiv. of 2a and 0.1 equiv. of HNTf₂ in 1,4 - dioxane, the reaction was carried out at [[FORMULA_2]] for 6 h. source_text: The catalyst was screened using different types of acids, including common organic acids (such as formic acid, acetic acid, trifluoroacetic acid, p -toluenesulfonic acid, succinic acid, and benzenesulfonic acid) and common inorganic acids (such as hydrochloric acid, nitric acid, sulfuric acid, phosphoric acid, hydrobromic acid, phosphorous acid, sulfurous acid, and tetrafluoroboric acid), as well as catalyst Cat.I，Cat. II and Cat.III (Table 1). Under the given conditions ( 8 0 ^ { \circ } \mathrm { C } , 6 \mathrm { h } , catalyst amount = 1 0 \mathrm { m o l \% } ), only HNTf₂ and its analogues Cat.I, Cat.II were able to catalyze the reaction, whereas common organic acids, inorganic acids, and Cat.III had no catalytic effect (Table 1). Compared with its analogues (Cat.I, Cat.II), HNTf₂ exhibited better catalytic performance.

protected_source_text: The catalyst was screened using different types of acids, including common organic acids (such as formic acid, acetic acid, trifluoroacetic acid, [[FORMULA_1]] -toluenesulfonic acid, succinic acid, and benzenesulfonic acid) and common inorganic acids (such as hydrochloric acid, nitric acid, sulfuric acid, phosphoric acid, hydrobromic acid, phosphorous acid, sulfurous acid, and tetrafluoroboric acid), as well as catalyst Cat.I，Cat. II and Cat.III (Table 1). Under the given conditions [[FORMULA_2]] , catalyst amount [[FORMULA_3]] ), only HNTf₂ and its analogues Cat.I, Cat.II were able to catalyze the reaction, whereas common organic acids, inorganic acids, and Cat.III had no catalytic effect (Table 1). Compared with its analogues (Cat.I, Cat.II), HNTf₂ exhibited better catalytic performance.

Compared with its analogues (Cat.I, Cat.II), HNTf₂ exhibited better catalytic performance.

translation_unit_protected_translated_te: 催化剂筛选使用了多种类型的酸，包括常见有机酸（如甲酸、乙酸、三氟乙酸、[[FORMULA_1]]对甲苯磺酸、琥珀酸和苯磺酸）以及常见无机酸（如盐酸、硝酸、硫酸、磷酸、氢溴酸、亚磷酸、亚硫酸和四氟硼酸），以及催化剂 Cat.I、Cat.II 和 Cat.III（表 1）。在给定条件下[[FORMULA_2]]，催化剂用量[[FORMULA_3]]），只有 HNTf₂ 及其类似物 Cat.I、Cat.II 能够催化该反应，而常见有机酸、无机酸以及 Cat.III 均无催化效果（表 1）。与其类似物（Cat.I、Cat.II）相比，HNTf₂ 表现出更优的催化性能。
translation_unit_translated_text: 催化剂筛选使用了多种类型的酸，包括常见有机酸（如甲酸、乙酸、三氟乙酸、p对甲苯磺酸、琥珀酸和苯磺酸）以及常见无机酸（如盐酸、硝酸、硫酸、磷酸、氢溴酸、亚磷酸、亚硫酸和四氟硼酸），以及催化剂 Cat.I、Cat.II 和 Cat.III（表 1）。在给定条件下( 8 0 ^ { \circ } \mathrm { C } , 6 \mathrm { h }，催化剂用量= 1 0 \mathrm { m o l \% }），只有 HNTf₂ 及其类似物 Cat.I、Cat.II 能够催化该反应，而常见有机酸、无机酸以及 Cat.III 均无催化效果（表 1）。与其类似物（Cat.I、Cat.II）相比，HNTf₂ 表现出更优的催化性能。

source_text: With \mathrm { H N T f } _ { 2 } as a promising catalyst, the solvent effect has been investigated. The reaction was conducted in a variety of solvents, including both polar and non-polar ones, such as 1,4-dioxane, DMF, DMSO, acetic acid, toluene, cyclohexane, and 1,2-dichloroethane. The results indicate that all these solvents are effective, and the polar sol- vents exhibit even better performance.

protected_source_text: With [[FORMULA_1]] as a promising catalyst, the solvent effect has been investigated. The reaction was conducted in a variety of solvents, including both polar and non-polar ones, such as 1,4-dioxane, DMF, DMSO, acetic acid, toluene, cyclohexane, and 1,2-dichloroethane. The results indicate that all these solvents are effective, and the polar sol- vents exhibit even better performance.

The reaction was conducted in a variety of solvents, including both polar and non-polar ones, such as 1,4-dioxane, DMF, DMSO, acetic acid, toluene, cyclohexane, and 1,2-dichloroethane. The results indicate that all these solvents are effective, and the polar sol- vents exhibit even better performance.
translation_unit_protected_source_text: With [[FORMULA_1]] as a promising catalyst, the solvent effect has been investigated. The reaction was conducted in a variety of solvents, including both polar and non-polar ones, such as 1,4-dioxane, DMF, DMSO, acetic acid, toluene, cyclohexane, and 1,2-dichloroethane. The results indicate that all these solvents are effective, and the polar sol- vents exhibit even better performance.
translation_unit_protected_translated_te: 在[[FORMULA_1]]作为一种有前景的催化剂，溶剂效应已被研究。该反应在多种溶剂中进行，包括极性和非极性溶剂，如1,4-二氧六环、DMF、DMSO、乙酸、甲苯、环己烷和1,2-二氯乙烷。结果表明，所有这些溶剂均有效，且极性溶剂表现出更优的性能。

render_source_text: With [[FORMULA_1]] as a promising catalyst, the solvent effect has been investigated. The reaction was conducted in a variety of solvents, including both polar and non-polar ones, such as 1,4-dioxane, DMF, DMSO, acetic acid, toluene, cyclohexane, and 1,2-dichloroethane. The results indicate that all these solvents are effective, and the polar sol- vents exhibit even better performance.

source_text: Subsequently, we applied the conditions from entry 1, which rep- resented the best reaction conditions, to investigate the substrate scope (Table 2). In a typical procedure, the biaryl compound (such as biaryl, diaryl ether, diaryl thioether, and diarylamine), a ketone (such as flu- orenone, acridinone, xanthenone, anthraquinone, and other diary- lketones), and an appropriate amount of solvent (e.g., 1,4-dioxane, acetic acid, DMF) were placed in a round-bottom flask or a Schlenk flask (wrapped in aluminum foil to avoid side reactions under light condi- tions) [26]. Then, the catalyst HNTf₂ ( \leq 1 0 \mathrm { \ m o l } \% ) was added. The
